narrative:
Precinct Westerville City I (precinct in Delaware County) has 942 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.8 percentage points.
